message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam linetype ortho

package "Product" as Product {
    entity "Product" as Product {
        +uniqueInternalCode
    }
    
    value object "ShortDescription" as ShortDescription
    value object "LongDescription" as LongDescription
    value object "TechnicalDescription" as TechnicalDescription
    value object "Barcode" as Barcode
    value object "ProductionCode" as ProductionCode
    value object "PriceWithoutVAT" as PriceWithoutVAT
    value object "PriceWithVAT" as PriceWithVAT
    value object "Reference" as Reference
    value object "Weight" as Weight
    value object "Volume" as Volume
    value object "Photo" as Photo
    value object "BrandName" as BrandName
}

package "Category" as Category {
    entity "Category" as Category {
        +AlphanumericCode
    }
    
    value object "Description" as Description
    value object "SuperCategory" as SuperCategory
}

Product -d--> ShortDescription : characterized by
Product -d--> LongDescription : characterized by
Product -d--> TechnicalDescription : characterized by
Product -d--> Barcode : identified by
Product -d--> ProductionCode : identified by
Product -d--> PriceWithoutVAT : associated
Product -d--> PriceWithVAT : associated
Product -d--> Reference : identified by
Product -d--> Weight : characterized by
Product -d--> Volume : characterized by
Product -d--> Photo : described
Product -d--> BrandName : made by

Category -d--> AlphanumericCode : identified by
Category -d--> Description : characterized by
Category -d--> SuperCategory : belongs to

Product -d--> Category : organized by

@enduml
```
